packages.name: 3 days Amsterdam
packages.description: Canal cruises, Rijksmuseum masterpieces and golden-hour cycling through the Jordaan.

packages.name: 3 days Athens
packages.description: Acropolis at dawn, ancient agora and rooftop taverna nights above the city lights.

packages.name: 3 days Barcelona
packages.description: Gaudí's unfinished cathedral, Gothic Quarter labyrinth and Barceloneta seafood evenings.

packages.name: 3 days Bergen
packages.description: Bryggen's painted warehouses, the Fløibanen funicular and fresh fish on the harbour quay.

packages.name: 3 days Berlin
packages.description: Cold War checkpoints, world-class museum island and a nightlife scene that never really ends.

packages.name: 3 days Brussels
packages.description: Art Nouveau architecture, the Grand Place at midnight and Belgium's finest chocolate and beer.

packages.name: 3 days Budapest
packages.description: Baroque thermal baths, Danube bridge views and a ruin bar scene unlike anywhere in Europe.

packages.name: 3 days Copenhagen
packages.description: Nyhavn's coloured townhouses, new Nordic food and a cycle-friendly city built for wandering.

packages.name: 3 days Dublin
packages.description: Georgian squares, the Book of Kells and a pub session that turns into an accidental late night.

packages.name: 3 days Dusseldorf
packages.description: Rhine promenades, the Altstadt old town and one of Germany's most underrated food scenes.

packages.name: 3 days Edinburgh
packages.description: Castle ramparts, the Royal Mile's medieval closes and whisky tastings in a city built on volcanic rock.

packages.name: 3 days Florence
packages.description: Michelangelo's David, Renaissance frescoes and bistecca Fiorentina on the Arno riverbanks.

packages.name: 3 days Frankfurt
packages.description: Medieval Römerberg, modern skyline and apple wine in a Sachsenhausen cider tavern.

packages.name: 3 days Geneva
packages.description: The Jet d'Eau, Lake Geneva promenades and Swiss watchmaking in an unexpectedly compact city.

packages.name: 3 days Glasgow
packages.description: Mackintosh architecture, the Kelvingrove museum and the warmest welcome in any British city.

packages.name: 3 days Helsinki
packages.description: Market Square herring, island fortress views and a public sauna ritual on the harbour edge.

packages.name: 3 days Innsbruck
packages.description: Habsburg Golden Roof, Swarovski crystal worlds and Alpine panoramas from the Nordkette cable car.

packages.name: 3 days Interlaken
packages.description: Two lakes, the Jungfrau railway and an Eiger north face that fills the entire horizon.

packages.name: 3 days Inverness
packages.description: Loch Ness monster hunts, Highland castle ruins and whisky distillery visits in the northern capital.

packages.name: 3 days Lisbon
packages.description: Fado in the Alfama, vintage tram rattles and pastel de nata with Atlantic views.

packages.name: 3 days London
packages.description: Tower of London, Thames cruise, Borough Market and the sheer scale of a city that never runs out.

packages.name: 3 days Lucerne
packages.description: Chapel Bridge reflections, Mount Titlis snow and a lake framed by peaks on every side.

packages.name: 3 days Madrid
packages.description: Prado masterpieces, Retiro Park Sunday mornings and a tapas crawl through La Latina.

packages.name: 3 days Milan
packages.description: The Duomo rooftop, Da Vinci's Last Supper and aperitivo hour in the Navigli canal district.

packages.name: 3 days Munich
packages.description: Marienplatz glockenspiel, BMW museum and a Biergarten under the chestnut trees.

packages.name: 3 days Mykonos
packages.description: Whitewashed windmills, Aegean beach clubs and the Little Venice waterfront at sunset.

packages.name: 3 days Nice
packages.description: Promenade des Anglais, Cours Saleya flower market and a day trip to Monaco's casino square.

packages.name: 3 days Oslo
packages.description: Viking ships, the Vigeland sculpture park and Aker Brygge waterfront with fjord views.

packages.name: 3 days Paris
packages.description: Eiffel Tower second floor, Seine cruise past Notre-Dame and Montmartre at golden hour.

packages.name: 3 days Prague
packages.description: Charles Bridge at dawn, Bohemian crystal cellars and the best beer in Central Europe.

packages.name: 3 days Rome
packages.description: Colosseum, Vatican Museums, Trevi Fountain and gelato in a city where every cobblestone has history.

packages.name: 3 days Salzburg
packages.description: Mozart's birthplace, Hohensalzburg fortress and Sound of Music locations in a baroque Alpine city.

packages.name: 3 days Santorini
packages.description: Blue-domed churches, caldera sunsets and volcanic black sand beaches on Greece's most dramatic island.

packages.name: 3 days Stockholm
packages.description: Gamla Stan medieval island, the Vasa warship museum and archipelago views from Djurgården.

packages.name: 3 days Venice
packages.description: Grand Canal vaporetto rides, St Mark's mosaics and a gondola through the back canals at dusk.

packages.name: 3 days Vienna
packages.description: Schönbrunn Palace, coffeehouse culture and Strauss waltzes in a city frozen in imperial grandeur.

packages.name: 3 days Zurich
packages.description: Lake Zurich promenades, Bahnhofstrasse shopping and a day trip to the Rhine Falls.
